forests.objective: UI approval hold test: pause before execution

procedure.summary: Validate Atlas Airfolio flow and core interactions for objective: UI Approval Hold Test for Atlas Airfolio
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes:
This test is designed to pause execution and require manual UI approval before proceeding.  It verifies the basic presence of key elements on the page.  Ensure the application is in its expected initial state before approving the test.
After UI approval, execution should resume.

forests.objective: Demo run 2: validate scrolling airplane timeline and button interactions

procedure.summary: Validate Atlas Airfolio flow and core interactions for objective: Demo run 2: Validate scrolling airplane timeline and button interactions on Atlas Airfolio.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes:
This test validates the basic functionality of the Atlas Airfolio website, including navigation through the timeline and interaction with key buttons. Screenshots are captured for evidence.
Validate sections render while scrolling and no obvious runtime errors.

procedure.summary: Atlas Airfolio Demo Run 2: Validate scrolling airplane timeline and button interactions.
procedure.confirmMessage: Successfully validated scrolling timeline and button interactions on Atlas Airfolio.

steps.action: Navigate to the Atlas Airfolio homepage.
Click the 'Launch' link to initiate the route.
Assert that the '#active-label' element is visible, indicating route progression.
Assert that the '#plane' element is visible, indicating the airplane is moving.
Click the 'Flight Path' link to view the flight path details.
Assert that the '#flight-path' element is visible, confirming the flight path details are displayed.
Click the 'Black Box' link to access the black box information.
Assert that the '#black-box' element is visible, confirming the black box information is displayed.
Click the 'Hangar' link to navigate to the hangar section.
Assert that the '#hangar' element is visible, confirming the hangar section is displayed.

procedure.notes:
This test validates the core functionality of the Atlas Airfolio application, focusing on the scrolling timeline and button interactions.,Screenshots should be captured at key steps to provide visual evidence of the application's state.,Consider adding more specific assertions to validate the content displayed in each section (Flight Path, Black Box, Hangar).,The scroll action is generalized. Consider adding more granular scroll actions to test different scroll positions.
Validate sections render while scrolling and no obvious runtime errors.

procedure.summary: Atlas Airfolio Demo Run 1: Validate scrolling airplane timeline and button interactions.
procedure.confirmMessage: Successfully validated scrolling timeline and button interactions on Atlas Airfolio.

steps.action: Navigate to the Atlas Airfolio homepage.
Click the 'Launch' link to initiate the route.
Assert that the '#active-label' element is visible, indicating the route has started.
Scroll down the page to trigger the airplane timeline animation.
Assert that the '#plane' element is visible, indicating the airplane animation is running.
Click the 'Flight Path' link to view the flight path details.
Assert that the '#flight-path' element is visible, indicating the flight path details are displayed.
Click the 'Black Box' link to access the black box information.
Assert that the '#black-box' element is visible, indicating the black box information is displayed.
Click the 'Hangar' link to navigate to the hangar section.
Assert that the '#hangar' element is visible, indicating the hangar section is displayed.

procedure.notes:
This test validates the core functionality of the Atlas Airfolio application, including the scrolling timeline animation and navigation between key sections.,Robust selectors (text and ids) are used to ensure the test remains stable even if the application's layout changes.,Assertions are included to verify that the expected elements are visible after each action.,Consider adding more specific assertions to validate the content of each section in future tests.
Validate sections render while scrolling and no obvious runtime errors.

forests.objective: Prepare a testing plan for the airplane portfolio scroll experience and wait for approval

procedure.summary: Validate Atlas Airfolio flow and core interactions for objective: Comprehensive test plan for the Atlas Airfolio website, focusing on the airplane portfolio scroll experience, section readability, CTA visibility, and overall polish.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes: This test plan focuses on the core scrolling experience and section readability.,Pay close attention to the airplane's motion and ensure it doesn't feel jarring or unnatural.,Ensure all Call-To-Actions (CTAs) are clearly visible and easily accessible.,Consider testing on different screen sizes and browsers to ensure responsiveness.,The 'assert' values are guidelines; adjust them based on the specific implementation and expected behavior.

forests.objective: Validate the airplane portfolio scroll experience

procedure.notes: The route map should move visually as the page scrolls through Launch Runway, Cabin Systems, Atlas Stack, and Landing Brief.
procedure.summary: Review the single-page airplane portfolio and confirm the scroll-linked plane journey feels readable and intentional.

forests.objective: Validate the ball animation is running continuously for at least 10 seconds, confirm the rotation/speed/energy readouts change over time, and fail if motion appears static.

procedure.summary: Validate Ball Physics Inside Rotating Square flow and core interactions for objective: Validate the rotating box physics demo runs continuously for 10 seconds and that the readouts (speed, angle, energy) change dynamically, indicating the simulation is active.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes: This test validates the core functionality of the rotating box physics demo.,It ensures the simulation is running and that the readouts are updating, indicating dynamic behavior.,The test waits for 10 seconds to allow sufficient time for the readouts to change.,The use of variable storage and comparison ensures that the readouts are actually changing and not just displaying static values.,The test will fail if any of the readouts remain unchanged after 10 seconds, indicating a problem with the simulation.

forests.objective: Validate the ball animation is running continuously for at least 10 seconds, confirm the rotation/speed/energy readouts change over time, and fail if motion appears static.

procedure.summary: Validate Ball Physics Inside Rotating Square flow and core interactions for objective: Validate the rotating box physics demo by ensuring the ball animation runs continuously for 10 seconds and that the rotation, speed, and energy readouts change over time, indicating a dynamic simulation.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes: This test validates the core functionality of the rotating box physics demo by ensuring the simulation runs continuously and the readouts reflect dynamic changes. The screenshots can be used for visual confirmation of the animation.

procedure.summary: Validate Ball Physics Inside Rotating Square flow and core interactions for objective: Validate the rotating box physics demo animation runs continuously for at least 10 seconds, confirming dynamic readouts and failing if motion appears static.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes: This test validates the dynamic nature of the rotating box physics demo by checking if the speed, angle, and energy readouts change over a 10-second period. A screenshot is taken for visual confirmation.

procedure.summary: Validate Ball Physics Inside Rotating Square flow and core interactions for objective: Validate the continuous animation of the rotating box physics demo and verify dynamic updates to speed, angle, and energy readouts.
procedure.confirmMessage: Confirm this testing procedure. You can add extra checks before execution (auth, edge cases, copy assertions).
procedure.notes: This test assumes the presence of elements with IDs 'speed-readout', 'angle-readout', 'energy-readout', and 'sim'.,The 10-second wait time can be adjusted based on the expected animation speed.,The 'notEqual' assertions ensure that the readouts are dynamically updating, indicating that the simulation is running.,If any of the assertions fail, the test will indicate that the animation is not running as expected.,Consider adding visual validation to confirm the ball is moving if readout changes are minimal.

forests.objective: Click the animation button and verify UI state transitions to completed

procedure.summary: Validate Button Animation Validation flow and core interactions for objective: Test button animation and verify status update.

forests.objective: Click the animation button and verify UI state transitions to completed

procedure.summary: This test validates the button animation functionality by clicking the 'Run animation' button and verifying the status text changes to 'Completed'.

steps.action: Wait for the status text to change to 'Completed'

procedure.notes: This test focuses on the core functionality of the animation button. It verifies that clicking the button triggers the animation and that the status text updates correctly.  The test uses robust selectors to ensure maintainability.  The test assumes the initial state of the status text is not 'Completed'.
